name: P.C.S. Machine Group Holding Public Company Limited
summary: P.C.S. Machine Group Holding Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes automotive parts and electronic products in Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company provides engine parts, transmission parts, final drives, and others, as well as offers forged steel parts and molds. It also engages rental of properties. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Nakhon Ratchasima, Thailand.
